title: 3D Mace
description: Makes maces be 3D in hand and 2D in the inventory.
body:
## Summary
This is a simple pack that makes the new mace 3D, while keeping it 2D in the inventory.

## Credits
Special thanks for Shock Micro and asdru22, who made the [shader](https://github.com/asdru22/CorePerspectiveModels) that allows this pack to be possible.
